name: Dr. Eleanor Vance

strategicPositions.title: The Quantum Leap: Preparing Industries for a New Computational Paradigm
Ethical Frameworks for Autonomous AI: Navigating the Uncharted

bio: Dr. Eleanor Vance is a pioneering strategist at the forefront of emerging technologies. With a Ph.D. in Applied Physics and over two decades of experience, she advises global leaders on navigating the complexities of quantum computing, artificial intelligence, and the future of urban environments. Her work is dedicated to ensuring technological advancements are harnessed ethically and for the betterment of society.

name: Marcus Chen

strategicPositions.title: Beyond Recycling: Implementing True Circularity in Global Supply Chains
The ROI of Sustainability: How Green Investments Drive Profitability

bio: Marcus Chen is a leading expert in transforming businesses through sustainable practices and circular economy models. His innovative strategies help organizations reduce their environmental footprint while enhancing profitability and brand reputation. Marcus is a sought-after speaker on renewable energy transitions and the future of impact-driven finance.

name: Aisha Khan

strategicPositions.title: The Digital Self: Understanding Identity in the Age of Social Media
Brain Waves to Bottom Line: The Neuroscience of Purchase Decisions

bio: Aisha Khan is a visionary strategist who blends digital anthropology with cutting-edge neuromarketing techniques. She provides businesses with profound insights into consumer behavior across diverse cultural landscapes, enabling them to create deeply resonant brand experiences. Aisha's work is pivotal in shaping how companies connect with their audiences in an increasingly complex digital world.
